title: Application range for efficient IPM
subtitle: Δόσεις εφαρμογής για αποτελεσματική διαχείριση
description: A guide on the appropriate dosage range for efficient integrated pest management in vegetable production to control pathogens and pests while avoiding resistance development. It highlights the importance of recommended dose application to conserve biodiversity and maintain the effectiveness of protection products in modern IPM systems.
